mapper.delete: delete from tbl_follow where follower_id = #{followerId} and following_id = #{followingId}
mapper.select: select f.id, f.follower_id, f.following_id, f.created_datetime, m.member_nickname, m.member_handle, (select fi.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file fi on mpf.id = fi.id where mpf.member_id = f.follower_id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as member_profile_file_name from tbl_follow f join tbl_member m on f.follower_id = m.id where f.following_id = #{followingId} order by f.created_datetime desc

select f.id, f.follower_id, f.following_id, f.created_datetime, m.member_nickname, m.member_handle, (select fi.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file fi on mpf.id = fi.id where mpf.member_id = f.following_id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as member_profile_file_name from tbl_follow f join tbl_member m on f.following_id = m.id where f.follower_id = #{followerId} order by f.created_datetime desc
